name: Semrush
description: Access SEO, Trends, and Projects APIs for keyword research, domain analysis, and rank tracking
longDescription: Official Semrush MCP server providing access to all Trends API, all SEO API, and read-only Projects API. Supports both OAuth and API key authentication. API key must be passed as 'Authorization: Apikey YOUR_API_KEY' header. Get your API key from Subscription Info > API Units in Semrush.
author: Semrush

apiKeyConfig.label: Semrush API Key
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Copy your API key from Subscription Info > API Units (format: plain key, not Bearer)

examplePrompts: Find keyword volume for 'best running shoes'
Track rankings for my target keywords
Run a site audit for technical SEO issues
Analyze backlink profile of a competitor
Get traffic estimates for a domain
